project_type: TypeScript monorepo - 9-app interconnected platform (social, messaging, video, AI, ads, cloud, photos, edits, email)
build_system: pnpm + Turborepo. Tasks: lint, typecheck, test, build. Uses workspace:* protocol for internal deps.
test_framework: vitest with global config at root vitest.config.ts. Tests in __tests__ dirs. 41 existing test files.
verification_instructions: Run pnpm turbo typecheck to verify all TypeScript compiles. Run pnpm turbo test to run vitest suites.
setup_instructions: pnpm install (dependencies already installed). Node 22, pnpm 10.28.1.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install from npm registry. No Docker daemon available for builds. Use host-based TypeScript validation only.
contribution_requirements: ESM modules (type: module), TypeScript strict mode, conventional commits, prettier formatting.
key_patterns: Each package has src/index.ts barrel export, src/types.ts for type definitions, src/core/ for implementations. Packages use @quant/ namespace. Services use Fastify. Frontend uses React 19. Classes export from core/ directory with full implementations (not stubs). Types are comprehensive with unions, generics, and discriminated unions.
relevant_files: packages/ml-pipeline/src/core/ - 14 files, 4529 lines of ML algorithms
packages/recommendations/src/core/ - 13 files, 3890 lines of rec algorithms
packages/realtime/src/ - websocket, channels, presence, backpressure, delivery
services/ - 11 backend API services with Dockerfiles
directory_structure: Root: apps/ (9 frontend apps), packages/ (28 shared packages), services/ (11 backend APIs), infra/ (terraform, helm, monitoring). Each package: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/core/*.ts
